title: Ye jarur kar lena ‼️ #insurance #terminsurance #smart #finance #savings #finsaheli
description:
This one trick saved his policy : Harshad Mehta lost everything in the 1992 scam – money, properties, accounts.
But one thing worth ₹10 crore stayed untouched – his life insurance policy under MWPA (Married Women’s Property Act 1874).

Why? Because once a policy is taken under MWPA with wife and kids as nominees no court bank or creditor can ever touch it.

This protection isn’t just for the rich, It’s for you too.
Secure your family’s future with a term plan under MWPA 🫰🏻
.
.
.
